## Drug Coverage

| Drug | Tier | Status | Requirements |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| omeprazole oral capsule, delayed release(dr/ec) 10 mg, 20 mg, 40 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| omeprazole-sodium bicarbonate oral capsule 20- 1.1 mg-gram, 40-1.1 mg-gram | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| omeprazole-sodium bicarbonate oral packet 20- 1,680 mg, 40-1,680 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| naproxen-esomeprazole oral tablet, ir, delayed rel, biphasic 375-20 mg, 500-20 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| esomeprazole magnesium oral capsule, delayed release (dr/ec) 40 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| esomeprazole magnesium oral granules dr for susp in packet 10 mg, 2.5 mg, 20 mg, 40 mg, 5 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |

## Your Cost

| Drug Type | In-Network | Out-of-Network |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Non-preferred generic and brand name drugs Specialty Drugs (per prescription or refill). You must use a specialty pharmacy for these drugs to be covered. | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $500 maximum per drug In-Network Specialty Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Specialty Pharmacy |
| Non-preferred generic and brand name drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $250 maximum per drug In-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy |
| Preferred Generic drugs | $25 copay | Not covered |
source: Essentials Formulary Drug List (E4) | Pages 51, 135 || Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan | Page 18
